name: listicle
description: Write a fully fleshed-out 'Top 10' style listicle article that is SEO-optimized, highly shareable, and genuinely useful to readers.
input_description: Topic or keyword for the listicle, target audience, and optional number of items (defaults to 10).
output_description: Complete listicle in Markdown with a keyword-rich title, compelling intro, numbered items each with a subheading and 2-4 paragraph explanation, and a conclusion with CTA.
